title: mesua calophylloides
intro: Mesua calophylloides, also known as the Malay tea tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mesua calophylloides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Mesua calophylloides can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal use, with some herbal preparations also incorporating it into supplements and topical creams.
